mapper.select: /* 에이전트 목록 조회 agent.selectAgentList */ SELECT A.AGENT_ID , A.AGENT_NM , A.AGENT_TYPE_CD , CC.CODE_NM AS AGENT_TYPE_CD_NM , A.DESCRIPTION , A.SORT_ORD , A.USE_YN , A.LAST_MDF_DT , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , CASE WHEN A.AGENT_TYPE_CD = '001' THEN (SELECT count(B.DATASET_ID) FROM TB_AGT_DS B WHERE A.AGENT_ID = B.AGENT_ID) WHEN A.AGENT_TYPE_CD = '002' THEN (SELECT count(C.DATAMART_ID) FROM TB_AGT_DM C WHERE A.AGENT_ID = C.AGENT_ID) ELSE 0 END AS CONN_COUNT FROM TB_AGT A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE CC ON A.AGENT_TYPE_CD = CC.CODE_ID AND CC.CODE_GRP_ID = 'AT000001' WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD, A.AGENT_ID
/* 모델 옵션 조회 agent.selectModelList */ SELECT A.MODEL_ID , A.MODEL_NAME FROM TB_LLM_MDL A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER

/* 에이전트 데이터셋 목록 조회 agent.selectAgentDsList */ SELECT A.AGENT_ID , A.DATASET_ID , B.DS_NM , A.CONN_YN , A.SORT_ORD , B.DESCRIPTION , IFNULL(C.DOC_COUNT, 0) AS DOC_COUNT , B.CHUNK_SIZE , B.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_AGT_DS A INNER JOIN TB_DS B ON A.DATASET_ID = B.DATASET_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATASET_ID , COUNT(DOC_ID) AS DOC_COUNT FROM TB_DS_DOC GROUP BY DATASET_ID ) C ON A.DATASET_ID = C.DATASET_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.AGENT_ID = #{agentId} ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD

/* 에이전트 데이터마트 목록 조회 agent.selectAgentDmList */ SELECT A.AGENT_ID , A.DATAMART_ID , B.DM_NM , A.CONN_YN , B.DESCRIPTION , B.DB_TYPE , B.TBL_CNT , B.LAST_VERIFY_DT FROM TB_AGT_DM A INNER JOIN TB_DM B ON A.DATAMART_ID = B.DATAMART_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.AGENT_ID = #{agentId} ORDER BY B.SORT_ORD
